summary: Audit production entrypoints, fixture paths, and no-op command surfaces
acceptance_criteria: Produce a matrix of production entrypoints versus fixture/test/demo entrypoints without changing product code.
Identify no-op, fixture-only, locally faked, or client-only success command paths relevant to R1 planning.
Separate existing bottom-layer capabilities from client-runtime integration gaps.
Preserve sim-core decoupling from React, Pixi, Electron, DOM, Node IO, and real-time APIs.
Do not create or start R1 implementation tasks.
required_tests: node -e parse all changed JSON files
git diff --name-only check proving no forbidden paths changed
notes: Read-only audit with process artifacts only.
Allowed future audit output is documentation/evidence, not code changes.
next_action: After the reconciliation closure record enters main, start one systems_architect writer in the reused RR0 worktree for the read-only production, fixture, and no-op audit.
